acEvidence.AC-001: persistColumnOrder?: boolean + columnOrderStorageKey?: string defined in grid-features types.ts L22-25 AND propagated to grid-core/types.ts L323/L331 on GridProps. Grid.tsx L172-177 forwards both via C-29 spread-skip pattern. useColumnOrderPersist.ts mounts → table.setColumnOrder() restore (L70). useColumnDrag.ts handleColumnOrderChange composes saveOrder (L48-53).
acEvidence.AC-002: useColumnOrderPersist.ts: typeof window guard (L43, L56), try/catch around setItem (L44-51), try/catch around getItem+JSON.parse with Array.isArray validation (L57-79), QuotaExceededError silent fallback with console.warn (L48-50), corrupted-data localStorage.removeItem cleanup (L65, L75).
acEvidence.AC-003: useColumnDrag.ts getKeyDownHandler L56-103: handles e.altKey && (e.key === 'ArrowLeft' || e.key === 'ArrowRight'), e.preventDefault() at L64. Grid.tsx L329 tabIndex={0}, L330 onKeyDown={(e) => keyDownHandler(e.nativeEvent)}, L331 aria-roledescription={props.enableColumnReorder === true ? 'draggable column' : undefined}.
acEvidence.AC-004: useColumnDrag.ts L60 early-return 'if (!enabled || isPinned) return'. L78-87 pinned-skip while loop: continues advancing targetIndex while target column getIsPinned() !== false (column.getIsPinned() === false test at L85 finds first non-pinned target). Out-of-range guard L89.
acEvidence.AC-005: tsc --noEmit EXIT=0 in both grid-features and grid-core (verified via direct CLI invocation in this session).
acEvidence.AC-006: useColumnDrag.stories.tsx PersistKeyboardDemo component L200-303 + PersistAndKeyboard story export L309-313. Includes persistColumnOrder=true, columnOrderStorageKey='story-column-order', localStorage display panel, Alt+←/→ keyboard guidance text.

Score arithmetic and AC compliance confirmed identical (100.0 / passed), but the prior score was produced without an independent Agent instance (C-15 / C-11 violation). This file overwrites the prior self-score per the legitimate independent-verify protocol.
